examples: Voters can be remarkably forgiving of presidents who fail to keep their campaign promises.
By forgiving, we can throw away the emotional baggage we carry for years.
In line of this view, spouses who are more forgiving show higher marital identity over time.
State troopers can be less forgiving than members of local agencies with regard to PC.
Better informed consumers are less likely to be disappointed, and more forgiving if they are.
